allow: Bash({ echo "=== FINAL VERIFICATION ===" echo "" echo "1. Files with /// documentation comments:" find . -name "*.swift" -type f -exec grep -l "\/\/\/" {})
Bash(wc -l echo "" echo "2. Files with /* multi-line comments:" find . -name "*.swift" -type f -exec grep -l "\/\*" {})
Bash(wc -l echo "" echo "3. Sample of remaining // patterns (should only be URLs and commented-out code):" find . -name "*.swift" -type f -exec grep -h "\/\/" {})
